source.title: Can I Cancel a Rental Once It's Active?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “Can I Cancel a Rental Once It's Active?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Once a fleet is actively rented, you cannot cancel the rental immediately. The borrower has full control until the rental period ends.
However, if you no longer want your fleet to be re-listed for future rentals, you can:
Click “Cancel Future Listing” on the fleet management panel.
This means:
The fleet will not be listed again once the current rental ends.
The current renter can continue using it until the rental expires or they cancel it.
